meta.title: Kronos Endurance Planner
meta.description: Race planning for Kronos SimSports endurance events

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.
login.errorNotConfirmed: Check your email — a confirmation link was sent.
login.errorLinkExpired: This link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
login.errorAuth: Authentication error. Try again or contact an administrator.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Your account will be activated by an administrator after review.
register.alreadyAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
register.successBody: A confirmation email was sent to {email}. Click the link to confirm your address, then wait for an administrator to activate your account.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errorEmailTaken: This email address is already in use. Try signing in.
register.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes before trying again.
register.errorMissingId: User ID missing after account creation. Try again or contact an administrator.

pending.title: Awaiting approval
pending.body1: Your profile has been created and is awaiting validation by an administrator.
pending.body2: You will receive an email once your account is approved. This page updates automatically — no need to refresh.
pending.body3: In the meantime, you can contact an administrator on Discord to speed up the process.

refused.title: Access denied
refused.body: Your access request has been denied. Contact an administrator if you think this is a mistake.

resetPassword.title: Forgot password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
resetPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link has been sent. Check your spam folder too.
resetPassword.errorRateLimit: Too many emails sent. Wait a few minutes before trying again.

updatePassword.title: New password
updatePassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Enter your current password, then your new one.
changePassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.errorSame: New password must be different from the current one.

availabilityGrid.clearAllConfirmPrompt: This will clear availabilities for all drivers. Type to confirm.
availabilityGrid.noDrivers: No drivers assigned to this entry.
availabilityGrid.clickDragHint: Click or drag on slots to mark your availability.
availabilityGrid.selectNameHint: Select your name to enable editing.
availabilityGrid.discordDefault: Default setting — change to configure this event separately.
availabilityGrid.clickDragApply: Click or drag to apply the selected mode.

planningTab.noStints: No stints configured in the active strategy.
planningTab.noTimesCalculated: Times not yet calculated — open the Stints tab to run the calculation, then come back.
planningTab.hoverHint: Hover over a stint to see details

performanceData.estimatedModifier: Estimated via modifier — no specific data for this condition
performanceData.noGarage61: Garage61 account not linked — the driver must connect their account from their profile.
performanceData.sessionExpired: Garage61 session expired — re-link the account from the driver profile.
performanceData.noLaps: No lap times recorded on this circuit.
performanceData.noDrivers: No drivers assigned to this entry.
performanceData.teamModifiersDesc: Applied as fallback when a driver has no specific data for this condition. Negative values allowed. Lap times shown with * use these modifiers.
performanceData.linkGarage61Desc: to import lap times from your practice sessions.

raceMode.noStrategy: No active strategy — set a strategy as active in the Stints tab.
raceMode.noStints: No stints planned — set up stints first.
raceMode.undoStopDesc: The pit stop will be undone and the stint will resume.
raceMode.wetAlert: 🌧 Wet track — apply to next stint?
raceMode.dryAlert: ☀️ Track drying — apply to next stint?
raceMode.tierTeamNoMod: Estimated via team average without configured modifier — low reliability

stintGrid.deleteActiveDesc: This strategy is active — Race Mode is currently using it. Choose a replacement strategy before deleting.
stintGrid.releaseDriverDesc: {count} eligible stints for {name} will be cleared. Lap data will be erased but the slots will remain in the schedule. The driver can be restored on reassignment.
stintGrid.noDrivers: No drivers assigned — assign drivers first.
stintGrid.activeStrategyTitle: Active strategy — used by Race Mode
stintGrid.startOffsetTitle: Minutes between the official start time and the actual green flag
stintGrid.setActiveTitle: Set as the strategy used by Race Mode
stintGrid.deleteStrategyTitle: Delete this strategy and all its stints
stintGrid.skipEndTitle: Target fuel to skip the last stop
stintGrid.tooltipLapsTeamNoMod: Laps calculated via estimated team average without configured modifier — low reliability
stintGrid.tooltipLapsTeamMod: Laps calculated via estimated team average with modifier
stintGrid.tooltipLapsTeamNoData: Laps calculated via team average — driver data missing
stintGrid.tooltipLapsModNoConfig: Laps calculated via unconfigured modifier — low reliability
stintGrid.tooltipFuelTeamNoMod: Fuel calculated via estimated team average without configured modifier — low reliability
stintGrid.tooltipFuelTeamMod: Fuel calculated via estimated team average with modifier
stintGrid.tooltipFuelTeamNoData: Fuel calculated via team average — driver data missing
stintGrid.tooltipFuelModNoConfig: Fuel calculated via unconfigured modifier — low reliability
stintGrid.tooltipMissingData: Driver data missing for some stints — team average used
stintGrid.recalcDesc: Based on actual data from completed stints. Only remaining stints are modified.
stintGrid.recalcNoChanges: ✓ No changes — the current strategy matches actual data.
stintGrid.deleteStrategyMsg: All stints for this strategy will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
stintGrid.deleteStintMsg: This stint will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
stintGrid.resetStintMsg: The driver, laps, and options for this stint will be cleared. The slot will remain in the schedule.
stintGrid.clearAllMsg: All stints for this team entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
stintGrid.prevDriverSlotTitle: This slot belonged to {name} — reassign this driver to trigger a restore prompt
stintGrid.raceCoveredWarning: ⚠️ The race is already covered by the planned stints.

driversTab.tooltipCar:
Entry car: {entryCar} — driver prefers: {preferred}
Class matches ({entryClass}).
driversTab.assignMessage: This entry starts at {slot}. Would you like to add this slot to the driver's preferences?
driversTab.unassignMessage: This driver was assigned to the {slot} slot. Would you like to remove it from their preferences?
driversTab.restoreMessage: This driver had {count} stints assigned in this entry before being removed. Would you like to restore them?
driversTab.restoreNote: Stint data (laps, notes) has been cleared — only the position in the schedule will be restored.
driversTab.noDriversAssigned: No drivers assigned to this entry.
driversTab.removeTooltip: Only the driver or an admin can remove

events.title: Events
events.archivedNotice: 📦 This event is archived — all data is read-only.
events.noSignupsFilter: No drivers match the active filters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.staleSyncWarning: Your iRacing data hasn't been synced in over 100 days.

driverList.title: Drivers
driverList.empty: No drivers registered. Start by adding one.
driverList.staleTitle: iRacing data not synced in over 100 days

driverForm.discordAlertHint: Default delay — can be adjusted per event in the Availability tab.
driverForm.errorIRacingIdDuplicate: This iRacing ID is already used by {name}.
driverForm.deleteMessage: This driver will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

driverProfile.staleWarning: ⚠️ iRacing data (car & track inventory) has not been synced in over 100 days.
driverProfile.errorSyncFailed: iRacing sync failed. Your data was not modified.
driverProfile.errorIRacingToken: iRacing authentication error. Please try again.
driverProfile.errorIRacingProfile: Could not retrieve iRacing profile. Please try again.
driverProfile.errorAlreadyLinked: This iRacing account is already linked to another driver.
driverProfile.errorGarage61Token: Garage61 authentication error. Please try again.
driverProfile.errorGarage61Save: Could not save Garage61 tokens. Please try again.
driverProfile.errorGarage61NoDriver: Garage61 account: driver profile not found. Contact an administrator.
driverProfile.errorGarage61Error: An unexpected error occurred while linking Garage61. Please try again.
driverProfile.errorGeneric: An authentication error occurred. Please try again.

driverEngagements.title: Engagements
driverEngagements.empty: This driver is not registered for any event.

driverStats.empty: No statistics available for this driver.
driverStats.roadWarning: This licence was split into Sports Car and Formula Car in 2024 and is no longer used.
driverStats.chartEmpty: Not enough data to display a chart yet. The chart will appear after several syncs.

garage61Stats.notLinked: No Garage61 account linked to your profile. Link your account to view practice statistics.
garage61Stats.empty: No practice data available for this driver on Garage61.

driverInventory.title: Inventory — {name}
driverInventory.noIRacingId: This driver has not linked their iRacing account yet. The inventory will be available after linking.
driverInventory.noDataSelf: No synced data. Click "Update" to import inventory from iRacing.
driverInventory.noDataOther: No synced data. This driver must start a sync from their profile.
driverInventory.errorSyncFailed: iRacing sync failed. Your data was not modified.
driverInventory.errorGeneric: An iRacing error occurred. Please try again.

equipageTabs.archivedNotice: 📦 This event is archived — all data is read-only.
equipageTabs.accessDeniedMsg: You must be registered for this event to view this entry.
equipageTabs.selfAssignHint: 💡 Join this entry via the table below to access the other tabs.
equipageTabs.availArchivedNote: Availability recorded at the time of archiving.
equipageTabs.availActiveNote: Select your name and click or drag over slots to mark your availability.
equipageTabs.stintsArchivedNote: Stints as planned at the time of archiving.
equipageTabs.stintsActiveNote: IRL and IG times are calculated automatically. Coloured dots show each driver's availability.
equipageTabs.perfArchivedNote: Performance data recorded at the time of archiving.
equipageTabs.perfActiveNote: Lap times and fuel recorded during practice. Click Edit to enter your data.

archiveToggle.unarchiveMsg: This event will be visible and editable again by all drivers.

deleteEvent.deleteMsg: This event and all associated data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

inventoryMatrix.noCarsMatch: No cars matching the selected filters.
inventoryMatrix.noTracksMatch: No tracks matching the selected filters.
inventoryMatrix.pageSubtitle: Overview of cars and tracks owned by drivers
inventoryMatrix.syncFailed: iRacing sync failed. Your data was not modified.
inventoryMatrix.syncError: An iRacing error occurred. Please try again.
inventoryMatrix.noEventType: No event type defined for this event.

eventForm.fridayHint: 💡 The date must be a Friday — Saturday and Sunday slots are generated automatically.
eventForm.noSpecialSlots: No predefined slots configured — add them in Admin → Settings.
eventForm.specialSlotsPreview: The following slots will be generated automatically after creation:
eventForm.startTimesOptional: Optional — can also be configured after creation.
eventForm.startTimesEditHint: IRL start times are managed from the event page. Times in 24h format.
eventForm.igTimesHint: Shared by all entries. Times in 24h format.
eventForm.greenFlagOffsetHint: Minutes between the official start time and the actual green flag (e.g. 14 for 3min practice + 8min qualifying + 3min grid). Used as the default offset in strategies.
eventForm.greenFlagOffsetHintShort: Minutes between the official start time and the actual green flag. Used as the default offset in strategies.
eventForm.errorFriday: The weekend date must be a Friday.
eventForm.errorIGStart: Invalid IG start time — expected format: HH:MM (e.g. 13:00).
eventForm.errorIGSunrise: Invalid IG sunrise time — expected format: HH:MM (e.g. 06:30).
eventForm.errorIGSunset: Invalid IG sunset time — expected format: HH:MM (e.g. 20:00).
eventForm.deleteEventMsg: Delete this event? All associated data will be removed.
eventForm.regenerateQuestion: Would you like to regenerate start times from predefined slots? Existing slots will be deleted.
eventForm.regenerateNoLoss: ✅ No slot preferences will be lost — all existing slots match the new times.
eventForm.regenerateDriverLoss: {count, plural, one {{count} driver will lose their slot preference because their slot no longer exists in the new times:} other {{count} drivers will lose their slot preference because their slot no longer exists in the new times:}}
eventForm.regenerateDriverWarning: These drivers will need to re-select their preferred slot on their next sign-up.
eventForm.regenerateEntryLoss: {count, plural, one {{count} entry will lose its assigned start slot because it no longer exists in the new times:} other {{count} entries will lose their assigned start slot because it no longer exists in the new times:}}
eventForm.regenerateEntryWarning: These entries will need to be reassigned to a new start slot.
eventForm.slotInUse: This slot is used by one or more entries and cannot be deleted.
eventForm.archivedNotice: 📦 This event is archived — all data is read-only.

entryForm.noStartSlots: No slots available — configure start times from the event page.
entryForm.noStartTimesConfigured: No start times configured for this event.
entryForm.noDriversAvailable: No unassigned drivers for this event.
entryForm.deleteMsg: Delete this entry? All associated data (stints, availability) will be removed.
entryForm.errorCarNumberDuplicate: Number #{number} is already used by another entry for this start slot.
entryForm.errorCarNumberDuplicateNamed: Number #{number} is already used by {name} for this start slot.
entryForm.errorDuplicateSlot: This entry is already registered for this start slot.
entryForm.errorDuplicateNumber: This race number is already used by another entry for this event.
entryForm.slotPrefNoPreference: {count, plural, one {driver does not have} other {drivers do not have}} this slot in their preferences
entryForm.slotPrefAdd: Would you like to add the slot

inscription.multipleNote: You can sign up for multiple teams separately.
inscription.startTimesNote: Optional — check the slots you want to participate in.
inscription.teamNote: Optional — select the team you want to join.
inscription.classesNote: Optional — select one or more classes.
inscription.carsNote: Optional — select one or more specific cars.
inscription.tagsNote: Optional — select one or more tags to describe your driver profile.
inscription.unsubscribeMsg: This sign-up will be permanently deleted.
inscription.classMismatch: This team's class ({entryClass}) does not match your preferences ({preferred}).
inscription.carMismatch: This team's car ({entryCar}) does not match your preferences ({preferred}). The class matches ({entryClass}).
inscription.alreadySignedUp: You are already signed up for this team.

championshipEdit.archiveMsg: This championship will be hidden from the active list. Rounds remain accessible.
championshipEdit.unarchiveMsg: This championship will be visible again in the active list.
championshipEdit.deleteMsg: This championship and all its rounds will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
